title: Burlan Guns
description:
Modified Ver of NodiaGN

A very simple to use guns plugin!
body:
## Burlan Guns Extension
This is a modification of [https://modrinth.com/plugin/nodia-guns-system](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nodia-guns-system)

This also fixes a lot of bugs that we really dont wanna fix on NodiaGN since Nodia has been discontinued for a month or two.

Literally just a 3 hour project about minecraft having boom boom guns but better

SINGLE: Pistol like 1 bullet per click
BURST: 5 bullet per click

CustomModelData support in gun configs. You can look at burst.yml template to see how it was used.
Aim Down Sights: !!! YAY !!! You can now shift to turn on ADS, And no. Not advirtpoos.. i forgor how to spell. You'll also need a seperate model for this. Same thing as CustomModelData, Just move your gun model to look like you are holding it infront of you.

Current Commands:

/burlaninfo /burlanguns givegun id / giveammo id

We have a discord now!!! [https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD](https://discord.gg/62493Tu5AD)
